title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Group India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Group India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!
